# Security Policy

For Shroud's full security policy, threat model, and vulnerability reporting instructions, see [docs/SECURITY.md](../docs/SECURITY.md).

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Use GitHub's [Security Advisories](../../security/advisories/new) to report vulnerabilities privately, or contact the maintainer (`loujr`) directly through GitHub.

### Response Timeline

| Step | Target |
|------|--------|
| Acknowledge receipt | 72 hours |
| Initial assessment | 1 week |
| Fix or mitigation plan | 2 weeks |
| Public disclosure | After fix is available |
